title: Accounting Mcp
text:
---
title: NRP Accounting MCP Server
description: Query NRP accounting data over MCP or an OpenAPI bridge.
---
import { Card, CardGrid, LinkCard } from '@astrojs/starlight/components';

The NRP Accounting MCP server provides read-only access to NRP accounting data stored in ClickHouse. It is intended for AI clients and tools that need to answer questions about namespace, institution, node, and resource usage.

<CardGrid>
  <LinkCard
    title="Native MCP endpoint"
    href="https://nrp-accounting-mcp.nrp-nautilus.io/"
    description="Preferred when the client supports MCP directly." />
  <LinkCard
    title="OpenAPI bridge"
    href="https://nrp-accounting-mcp.nrp-nautilus.io/openapi"
    description="Use this for Open WebUI and other OpenAPI-only tool clients." />
  <LinkCard
    title="OpenAPI docs"
    href="https://nrp-accounting-mcp.nrp-nautilus.io/openapi/docs"
    description="Interactive docs for the OpenAPI bridge." />
  <LinkCard
    title="Source repository"
    href="https://github.com/djw8605/nrp-clickhouse"
    description="Implementation, manifests, and deployment details." />
</CardGrid>

:::tip
Use the native MCP endpoint when the client supports MCP directly. In practice this has been more reliable than the OpenAPI bridge for structured tool calling.
:::

## What users can ask

- Top namespaces, institutions, or nodes by GPU, CPU, memory, storage, FPGA, or network usage
- Active namespaces over a date range
- Namespace summaries and trends
- Top nodes for a namespace
- Filter discovery by namespace, institution, node, resource, PI, or node institution
